series_metadata.series_title: Title Assistance – Customer Correspondence Requests and Inquiries
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes documentation that is supporting evidence that results in the issuance of a certificate of title. Documents may include, but not limited to, title correction and/or issuance assistance requests and inquiries received by mail, live chat, email, fax, in-person, and any other acceptable means from the general public, law enforcement, attorney general’s office, county clerk of courts title offices, dealers, other state or government agencies, and miscellaneous entities.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) months verification of imaged documents in BMV SharePoint Portal and Electronic Document Imaging System (EDIS) ; Electronic: in BMV SharePoint Portal seven (7) years from scan date. in EDIS seven (7) years from scan date
